title: 48 pcs Small Pocket Notebook,Mini Notebooks,Mini Motivational Journals,Mini Daily Journal Notepads for Kids Party Bag Fillers Party Favor or Filler
features: 【Package Includes】You will get 48 pieces of soft cover mini journal notepads in 16 different styles, each style has 2 pcs or 3 pcs (please refer to the pictures for more details), enough quantity and various styles for meeting your different demands.

【Mini Notebook Size】Each piece of pocket journal notebook measures approx. 8.5 x 12 cm/ 3.3 x 4.7 inches, and has 32 pages (16 sheets) and 13 lines design, They are with the size of a hand, portable and convenient to put in a pocket and carry with you.

【Quality Material】The mini notebook are made of quality paper material,small notebooks for kids are beautiful, firm, and not easy to fall off; In addition, smooth paper is convenient for you to write and draw beautiful pictures.
【Cute Design】This cute cartoon notepads is a super mini design,interesting pattern design on the cover, bright and vibrant, colorful and meaningful, easy to bring you good mood.

【Wide Application】Mini notebook is convenient and practical and can be applied for children party goodie bag fillers to record life.These small pocket notebook are suitable as nice festival gifts for kids,classmates,students back school, festival party,and kids birthday, reward, giveaway,classroom gifts,gifts for school children,class presents from teacher.
